component.name: IptvListRow
component.script:
sub init() m.focusBackground = m.top.findNode("focusBackground") m.titleLabel = m.top.findNode("titleLabel") m.metaLabel = m.top.findNode("metaLabel") m.badgeLabel = m.top.findNode("badgeLabel") m.titleLabel.font.size = 26 m.metaLabel.font.size = 18 m.badgeLabel.font.size = 18 end sub
sub showContent() content = m.top.itemContent titleText = "" metaText = "" badgeText = ""
if content <> invalid then titleText = Iptv_SafeString(content.title) metaText = Iptv_SafeString(content.meta) badgeText = Iptv_SafeString(content.badge) end if
m.titleLabel.text = Iptv_Truncate(titleText, 28) m.metaLabel.text = Iptv_Truncate(metaText, 34) m.badgeLabel.text = Iptv_Truncate(badgeText, 6) end sub
sub showFocus() focused = m.top.itemHasFocus m.focusBackground.visible = focused end sub
